SingSing Global

Lv 45
SingSing is a web3 singing platform revolutionizing the way users engage with singing, by offering a rewarding "Sing-to-Win" contest and more. Participants can use SING tokens to participate in weekly competitions and enjoy various entertainment features such as voting, draws, NFT market, and exclusive coupons.

Sekuya Multiverse

Lv 365
Welcome to Sekuya Multiverse! Where fantasy meets frenzy in an Epic Fantasy MOBA MMORPG extravaganza that unfolds across four whimsical worlds of adventure! 🌟 Unleash the excitement in our All New 5v5 battles with your very own personalized superpowers! 🌟 Dive into the future with our cutting-edge AI Character Creator, AI NPC pals, and let loose in AI-fueled battles that will blow your mind! 🌟 Immerse yourself in the MMORPG Metaverse, where the gaming magic never ends!
